name: Big Bucket in the Sky Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 Envelopes Tomato Soup Mix (or 2 Envelopes Cream of Tomato Soup)
2 Packages Good Seasons Italian Dressing Mix (dry packets)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients and stir until well mixed.
2. Place some of the mixture in a plastic bag, add chicken pieces, and shake to coat.
3. Melt butter in a pan over medium heat. Arrange chicken on top of the melted butter.
4. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 40 minutes.
Note: This recipe was featured on Phil's show and is attributed to Gloria, known as "The Copycat Lady."
